reasoning: Multi-step exploit chain (HTML comment discovery → cookie spoofing → ORDER BY blind injection via CASE WHEN) elevates this above single-trick challenges and roughly matches the 1.5 difficulty target. However, the WAF remains a single-layer keyword blacklist — albeit broader than most seen at this tier — leaving defense_depth weak per SAGE norms. The logistics theme, realistic multi-page app with parameterized queries on non-vulnerable endpoints, and proper Dockerfile hygiene (flag cleanup, non-root user) show solid production quality, but the core defense mechanism needed another orthogonal layer (rate limiting, input length restriction, or allowlist validation) to score above average on depth.
